---
title: "Neural Network from Scratch"
author: "Erick and Denver"
date: "2026-03-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```



Activation Functions
```{r}
sigmoid <- function(x){
  
}

#Beware of Dying relu, non negative inputs please!
relu <- function(x){
  if (x >= 0){
    x
  }else {
    0
  }
}

linear <- function(x){
  
}
```

Loss Functions
```{r}

binary_cross_entropy <- function(Y, preds){
  
}

sparse_categorical_cross_entropy <- function(Y,preds){
  
}


mean_square_error <- function(Y,preds){
  
}
```

Optimizer Functions
```{r}
```


Forward and Back Propagation
```{r}

forwardprop <- function(X,model){
  A = X
  for (i in 1:length(model)){
    Z = (A%*%(model[[i]]$W)) %>% as.numeric()
    Z = Z + model[[i]]$B
    
    if(model[[i]]$activation == "sigmoid"){
      A_next = sigmoid(Z)
    }else{
      A_next = relu(Z)
    }
    
    model[[i]]$cache = list(a_prev = A, z = Z, a_next = a_next)
    A = A_next
  }
}

backwardsprop <- function(){
  
}


update_params <- function(gradients, model, lr){
  for (i in 1:length(model)){
    model[[i]]$W =  model[[i]]$W - gradients[[i]]$derW * lr
    model[[i]]$B = model[[i]]$B - gradients[[i]]$derB * lr
  }
}


```


Training:
```{r}
makelayer <- function(inputsize, outputsize, actfunc = "sigmoid"){
  if (actfunc == "relu"){
    scale = sqrt(2/inputsize)
  }else{
    scale = sqrt(1/inputsize)
  }
  list(W = matrix(rnorm(inputsize *outputsize,mean = 0, sd = scale), nrow = inputsize, ncol = outputsize), B = matrix(0, nrow = 1, ncol = outputsize), activation = actfunc, storage =list())
}


buildmodel <- function(dims){
  ldims <- dims %>% length
  model <- list()
  for (i in 1:(ldims-1)){
    if (i== ldims-1){
      cur <- makelayer(dims[i], dims[i+1], actfunc = "relu")
      model[[i]] = cur
    }else{
      cur <- makelayer(dims[i], dims[i+1], actfunc = "sigmoid")
      model[[i]] = cur
    }
  }
  model
}
```

Initilize your model here
```{r}
train <- function(X,Y, model, lossfun, learningrate = 0.01){
  predictions <- forwardprop(X, model)
  
  if (lossfun =="bce"){
    binary_cross_entropy(predictions, Y)
  }else{
    mean_square_error(predictions, Y)
  }
  
  gradientres <- backpropogation(Y,predictions,model)
  
  update_parameters(model, predictions, learningrate)
}

#4 input features
# model dims must be a c()
modeldimension = c(4,16,8, 1)
model = buildmodel(modeldimension)

data = 
  
epochs = 500
replicate(epochs, train(X,Y,model, "bce"))
forwardprop(X_test, model)
```
